content.en:
The Dark Forbidden Realm has always been very mysterious, the True Ancestors dare not step into it, and the ordinary Dao Ancestors are not willing to enter the Dark Forbidden Domain, coupled with the countless opportunities in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm today, there are even fewer people who are willing to enter the Dark Forbidden Domain.

However, since the Heavenly Emperor Palace was born, it has sent a group of Dao Ancestors and True Ancestors to be stationed at the edge of the Dark Forbidden Domain, forcibly opening up a small world here, and it is naturally not difficult to do this with the foundation of the Heavenly Emperor Palace.

And the Dao Ancestor who is responsible for managing this small world is the Heavenly Emperor Palace's strongest Dao Ancestor - Black Wilderness Dao Ancestor.

this day.

The Black Desolate Dao Ancestor felt the power of the Dark Forbidden in the area near the Dark Forbidden Domain surging, and it was even more violent than usual, and he was immediately very puzzled.

"Let's go see how it goes!"

The Black Desolate Dao Ancestor walked out of the small world and began to walk in the Dark Forbidden Realm to investigate the situation.

This is the edge of the Dark Forbidden Domain, the distance from the realm is continuous, the power of the Dark Forbidden here is not very terrifying, and the danger is not very much, with the strength of his Supreme Dao Ancestor, there can be no great danger here, unless he is really unlucky to encounter a real forbidden creature.

The strength of such a forbidden creature is comparable to that of a half-step domain ancestor, and the weak one can be called an invincible Dao ancestor, in that case, his life will be in danger.

But true forbidden creatures are also extremely rare in the dark forbidden realm, and it is unlikely to be encountered.

The Black Desolate Dao Ancestor flew for a long time, and finally found the source of the riot caused by the dark forbidden power-

"It's ......"

The Black Desolate Dao Ancestor saw a creature, not an illusion, with his strongest Dao Ancestor's strength, if it was an illusion, he could see a clue.

However, the bug-like creature not far away was a real creature, not an illusory thing.

"Is it a forbidden creature?"

The Black Desolate Dao Ancestor was cold, and his heart was extremely frightened.

After all, once he encounters a forbidden creature, he is afraid that he will die.

Forbidden creatures are not forbidden bloodline creatures, the real forbidden creatures are composed of the power of the dark forbidden body, and they are born to control the forbidden path in the dark forbidden realm, how terrifying their strength is.

For cultivators, the body of a forbidden creature is equivalent to a ten percent forbidden body, and it is constantly strong and difficult to kill.

Moreover, the speed of the forbidden creature is comparable to that of the domain ancestor, and there is no way to avoid the pursuit of the forbidden creature.

"That's not right!"

The Black Desolate Dao Ancestor suddenly realized that something was wrong.

The aura of this creature was far inferior to his, and it could not be a forbidden creature.

Forbidden creatures don't know how to cultivate, they are naturally strong, and naturally they don't know how to hide their aura, and they don't know how to hide their strength.

But the aura of this creature in front of him was equivalent to that of a Dao Ancestor at the level of five or six heavens, and it was too weak to be a forbidden creature.

However, this creature doesn't quite look like a forbidden bloodline creature, and the forbidden bloodline creatures almost all live in the forbidden realm or some forbidden small worlds and some forbidden treasure lands, and it is unlikely that they can walk in the dark forbidden realm.

The Black Wilderness Dao Ancestor didn't dare to make a move, even if the other party was weak, he didn't dare to make a move, but returned to the small world and reported what he had discovered.

Soon after, an emperor arrived.

"I've seen the Emperor of Styx!"

Black Desolate Dao Ancestor said respectfully.

The Styx Emperor is the top ten emperor in the Heavenly Emperor Palace's combat power, and his strength is stronger than the invincible Dao Ancestor like the Guangling Emperor, and he is a truly terrifying and incomparably ancient emperor, and it is rumored that he has followed the ancient Vast Sea Ancestor to fight.

It's a pity that the luck is not good, so he has not been able to break through to the half-step domain ancestor, but there are also rumors that the Styx Emperor can step into the half-step domain ancestor combat power at any time.

"Black Desolate Dao Ancestor, conjure up the appearance of that creature, I'll identify it carefully!"

Styx Emperor Road.

"Yes!"

The Black Desolate Dao Ancestor conjured up the appearance of the insect.

After reading it, the Emperor of Styx frowned, and his expression was not quite right.

"Emperor Styx, do you know this thing?"

Black Desolate Dao Ancestor asked.

"There's a guess!" the Styx Emperor sighed, "I hope it's not true, otherwise there will be big trouble!"

Subsequently, the Emperor of the River Styx took the Black Desolation Dao Ancestor to the place where the insect creature was found, but the insect was no longer here, so the two of them followed the area where the dark forbidden power rioted.

Soon, they found bug creatures, and not one, but six or seven.

As they went deeper and deeper into the area where the Dark Forbidden Power was rioting, more and more bug creatures were discovered, but due to the Styx Emperor's clever concealment methods, they were able to hide from those bug creatures.

Abrupt.

A huge insect creature with a pair of pupils seemed to cross the dark forbidden void, saw the Styx Emperor, and aimed at the Styx Emperor with a pupil technique in the air.

The Emperor of the River Styx also fought back, and the two pupil techniques collided in the forbidden void, but they were not up or down at all.

"Retreat!"

The Emperor of the Styx River left here with the Black Desolate Dao Ancestors with a solemn expression, and withdrew from the Dark Forbidden Domain with the Dao Ancestors of the Small Heaven and Earth, and only stationed in the Realm Void outside the Dark Forbidden Domain.

"Emperor Styx, isn't that a real forbidden creature just now?"

Black Desolate Dao Ancestor panicked.

No wonder he was panicking, the strength of that huge insect was probably not weaker than that of the Styx Emperor, and it had the invincible Dao Ancestor combat power, he was far from being an opponent.

Fortunately, he didn't continue to investigate at that time, otherwise he would have died if he encountered that huge bug.

"It's not a forbidden creature!" said the Styx Emperor, "According to my speculation, it should be the forbidden zerg of the forbidden race!"

"Forbidden Race, Forbidden Zerg?"

The Black Desolate Dao Ancestor had never heard of this, so he was extremely confused.

At this time, the Emperor of Styx explained: "Let's put it this way, two types of beings will be born in one world, one is innate beings, and one world is innate gods and demons. The other is an ordinary acquired soul, although it is weak, its reproductive ability is too strong, and its potential is very high, and it is even expected to surpass the innate gods and demons. And the same is true of the Dark Forbidden Domain, where the forbidden creatures are equivalent to the real forbidden innate gods and demons, and the forbidden races are acquired souls. Under normal circumstances, the Dark Forbidden Realm cannot give birth to innate souls, but if there is a nest of forbidden races, a steady stream of forbidden races can be born. "

"The most common of the forbidden races is the Forbidden Zerg, but the Forbidden Zerg is more threatening than the Forbidden Creatures, after all, the Forbidden Creatures almost do not enter the realm, they don't like the environment of the realm, but the Forbidden Zerg is different, they devour everything, once they find the Daoshan Realm, I am afraid they will invade on a large scale. Moreover, they devour life growth, once they find the Dao Mountain Realm, I am afraid they will be able to grow rapidly in a short period of time. Once when they were in the Divine Heaven Realm, the Domain Ancestor mentioned the Forbidden Zerg, saying that they had found fragments floating from other realms in the Dark Forbidden Realm, with traces of the Forbidden Zerg and some records on them. But I never expected that there would also be a forbidden zerg in the dark forbidden domain here in the Dao Mountain Realm, fortunately it was discovered early, otherwise if they grow to a certain level and then invade the Dao Mountain Realm, we may not be able to stop it!"

After the Styx Emperor finished speaking, the Black Desolate Dao Ancestor understood how serious the matter was.
